sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The board didn't change (board_changed: false), which means the player couldn't move DOWN. The player is blocked by the left frame. The player is at row 25-27, col 16-19, and the left frame is at row 28-31, col 16-19. The player is above the frame, and can't move DOWN through it.
So I can't get below the left frame because the frame is blocking. Let me reconsider the activation mechanic.
For the right frame, the player was below the frame (row 28-31, col 44-47) when the frame was at row 24-27, col 44-47. The frame became 'G' when the player was below it.
For the left frame, the player is above the frame (row 25-27, col 16-19) when the frame is at row 28-31, col 16-19. The frame is still 'c'.
Maybe the frame only activates when the player is below it, not above it. But I can't get below the left frame because it's blocking.
Wait, let me reconsider. Maybe the frame activation depends on the player's white head position, not the green body. For the right frame, the player's white head was at row 28 (after collecting the frame, it expanded). But before collecting, the player's white head was at row 28, and the frame was at row 24-27. So the white head was below the frame.
For the left frame, the player's white head is at row 20-24, and the frame is at row 28-31. The white head is above the frame.
Maybe the frame only activates when the player's white head is below the frame. But I can't get the white head below the left frame because the frame is blocking.
Let me try a different approach. Maybe I need to activate the frame from the side. Let me move RIGHT to be to the right of the frame, then try pressing SPACE.
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the right frame collection. The player was at row 28-31, col 44-47 (below the frame). The frame was at row 24-27, col 44-47. When the player pressed SPACE, the frame was collected.
For the left frame, the player is at row 25-27, col 16-19 (above the frame). The frame is at row 28-31, col 16-19. Maybe the frame needs to be 'G' before it can be collected. But the frame is still 'c'.
Let me try pressing SPACE anyway to see what happens.

Goal model: Collect all three frames. Right frame collected. Need to activate and collect left and center-below frames.
Plan: Try pressing SPACE to see if it collects the frame even when it's 'c', or try a different approach.
